productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Brown Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, brown bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 31 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with an inner zipped compartment and an organiser pouch for essentials Two short handles woven through metallic loops with a buckle design for carrying ease and style A zipped pocket at the back Slightly ruched at the sides Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
